title: Horn apartment
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Horn apartment''' was the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] home of [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] after their marriage following the [[Bacta War]]. [[Whistler]] also lived there with the couple. It contained:

*A small but well-equipped kitchen
*A small living room
*A small bedroom, used by Mirax as an office for her import-export business
*A master bedroom, including [[Ottegan silk/Legends|Ottegan silk]] carpet and a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of [[Vreni Island]]
*A [[Refresher/Legends|refresher]] with [[Nerf-wool/Legends|nerf-wool]] towels

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
